name: Notch Pay
description: Notch Pay is a payment gateway enabling businesses to accept and send money via mobile money (MTN MoMo, Orange Money, M-Pesa, Yoomee) across multiple African countries. All transactions use XAF regardless of the customer's country — including CI, SN (normally XOF) and UG, KE, NG, GH.
example_prompt: Add Notch Pay checkout to accept MTN MoMo and Orange Money payments in Cameroon.
